title: For The Reign
description: That's my first Vanilla+ modpack made to fabric, focusing on adventure.
body:
![For The Reign](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c82eaa29bb46c8cd1871ccdcb80ca40d1ed33291.png)
Firstly, this modpack was made has friends request to our private server, but got so awesome that I decided to make it public and let others have fun like we had, and make the private server public.

This modpack include some vanilla+ improvements and tech additions.

## Advertisement
As my first modpack, you may get some errors or performance issues, but will be fixed posterly with some updates.

## Shaders
The modpack already come with two default shader pack that you can use, and I suggest use. They were used to take some photos, so you have some reference.

- [BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) by [CaptTatsu](https://bitslablab.com)

- [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) by [EminGT](https://www.complementary.dev)

## Mods
Actually this modpack have installed a total of 107 mod, and below you can find every mod installed and his creators.
